claim: BERT encoder-based models are effective for traditional NLP tasks but the field is shifting toward using LLMs with structured outputs instead of fine-tuned domain models
actionable: For NLP tasks like sentiment analysis or NER, experiment with using Claude/GPT-4 with structured output constraints instead of maintaining separate BERT-based models
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks

claim: Using LLM APIs for NLP extraction tasks is becoming cheaper than maintaining fine-tuned models due to operational overhead and high availability requirements
actionable: When evaluating whether to fine-tune models vs use APIs: factor in on-call support costs, model monitoring, and system reliability, not just raw inference cost
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks

claim: Source grounding - linking extracted entities back to original text locations - prevents hallucinations and enables verification in structured extraction tasks
actionable: When extracting information with LLMs, request character offsets or line numbers for each extraction to verify the model didn't hallucinate
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks

claim: Few-shot examples are more effective than detailed instructions for training LLMs to extract specific entity relationships from text
actionable: Instead of writing long entity definition rules, provide 3-5 concrete examples of text passages with expected extractions
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks

claim: Long-context extraction (100K+ word documents) can be processed efficiently by chunking documents while maintaining source grounding for results
actionable: Split large documents into chunks, extract from each, then track which chunk each result came from for full document attribution
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks

claim: Being vague about entity types in extraction prompts can cause the model to infer both 'product' and 'AI model' labels for the same entity, mixing categories
actionable: Define clear, mutually exclusive categories for extracted entities and clarify the distinction in your prompt examples
source_title: LangExtract - Google's New Library for NLP Tasks
